##################################################################

find_package(Boost REQUIRED COMPONENTS unit_test_framework system)

add_executable(uechotest
  ../BytesTest.cpp
  ../ClassListTest.cpp
  ../ClassTest.cpp
  ../ControllerTest.cpp
  ../DatabaseTest.cpp
  ../DeviceTest.cpp
  ../InterfaceTest.cpp
  ../LogTest.cpp
  ../MessageTest.cpp
  ../MiscTest.cpp
  ../MutexTest.cpp
  ../NodeListTest.cpp
  ../NodeTest.cpp
  ../ObjectListTest.cpp
  ../ObjectTest.cpp
  ../ObserverTest.cpp
  ../ProfileTest.cpp
  ../PropertyListTest.cpp
  ../PropertyMapTest.cpp
  ../PropertyTest.cpp
  ../ServerTest.cpp
  ../SocketTest.cpp
  ../TestDevice.cpp
  ../ThreadTest.cpp
  ../uEchoTest.cpp
)

target_include_directories(uechotest PRIVATE
  ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/include
  ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/src
  ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/..
)

target_link_libraries(uechotest PRIVATE
  uecho
  Boost::unit_test_framework
  Boost::system
)

add_test(NAME uechotest COMMAND uechotest)
